articles.title: Zuckerberg Admits Meta Censored Natural Health — But Algorithm Suppression Continues
articles.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's January 2025 admission that Meta's fact-checking was biased confirms years of systematic suppression of health freedom information. This isn't reform — it's strategic repositioning while algorithms still bury natural health content.

articles.title: Victor Davis Hanson Exposes Fauci's COVID Deception Campaign
articles.summary: Top officials including Anthony Fauci are under fire for repeated lies about COVID origins, treatments, and policies. The systematic deception by health authorities is finally facing scrutiny from mainstream voices.

articles.title: Congress Allocates $3.35 Billion for Next Pandemic Theater — Get Ready for Round Two
articles.summary: A House bill earmarks $3.35 billion for future 'global health threat orchestration' — essentially funding the infrastructure for the next manufactured health crisis. The pandemic industrial complex is already preparing its encore.

articles.title: ImmunityBio Faces Securities Fraud Lawsuit — Another Biotech Scam Unravels
articles.summary: ImmunityBio investors are pursuing a class action lawsuit over securities fraud, adding to the growing list of biotech companies caught misleading investors. The deadline for claims is May 26, 2026.

articles.title: New Book Exposes How Media Hypes 'Research That Is Absurd on Its Face'
articles.summary: Aaron Brown's 'Wrong Number' reveals how legitimate-looking research passes peer review despite being fundamentally flawed. The book exposes the systemic failure of academic gatekeeping beyond outright fraud.

articles.title: Peptide Market Explodes as FDA Faces Pressure to Stop Blocking Access
articles.summary: The 'Wild West' peptide craze is surging beyond GLP-1s as patients seek alternatives to overpriced pharma drugs. The FDA faces mounting pressure to ease restrictions on compounding pharmacies providing affordable access.

articles.title: Meta Pays 'Momfluencer' Doctors to Whitewash Child Safety Record
articles.summary: Meta has secretly paid Instagram influencers including doctors and psychologists with millions of followers to promote its teen safety features. The Tech Transparency Project exposes this astroturfing campaign designed to rehabilitate Meta's child exploitation image.

articles.title: Scientists Discover Leucine Supercharges Cellular Energy — Watch Pharma Try to Patent It
articles.summary: Researchers found that leucine, a nutrient in protein-rich foods, dramatically boosts mitochondrial function by protecting energy-producing proteins. This breakthrough reveals powerful diet-cellular energy connections that threaten pharma's metabolic drug empire.

articles.title: Zuckerberg's 'Reform' is Theater — Meta Still Censoring Natural Health While Admitting Years of Bias
articles.summary: Mark Zuckerberg finally admits Meta's fact-checkers suppressed health freedom information for years, but this isn't reform—it's damage control. While claiming to end bias, Meta's algorithms continue burying natural health content that threatens pharmaceutical profits.

articles.summary: Researchers found that leucine, a common amino acid in protein-rich foods, dramatically boosts cellular energy by protecting mitochondrial proteins. This dietary solution for cellular health threatens pharmaceutical energy-boosting drugs and supplements.
